detaileddescription.para: Information on the party that the user is joining
Optional party code used to join a party, will be used depending on what path this task is taking
Delegate to be fired after party join is complete
Status on the completion of the join party task, forwarded to delegate fired
Array of party member IDs to their display names, used in Finalize to construct member instances
Information on the party joined from the backend, used in Finalize to set up party object
Party data instance that will be initialized to the party object created in Finalize. We always want to have an instance of this associated with a party, even if there is no data to read.
ID of the party that we joined, used to fire delegates

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnlineSubsystemAccelByte *const InABInterface, const FUniqueNetId &InLocalUserId, const IOnlinePartyJoinInfo &InOnlinePartyJoinInfo, const FOnJoinPartyComplete &InDelegate)
memberdef.name: FOnlineAsyncTaskAccelByteJoinV1Party

detaileddescription.para: Constructor for joining a party through an invite

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnlineSubsystemAccelByte *const InABInterface, const FUniqueNetId &InLocalUserId, const FString &InPartyCode, const FOnJoinPartyComplete &InDelegate)
memberdef.name: FOnlineAsyncTaskAccelByteJoinV1Party

detaileddescription.para: Constructor for joining a party through a party code
Basic initialize override to check if we are using timeouts, and if so update the last task update time to the current time.
Simple tick override to check if we are using timeouts, and if so check the task timeout and complete the task unsuccessfully if it's over its timeout
Basic method to get the current name of the task, used for ToString on tasks as well as trace logs.
Should be overridden by any async task that extends from this base class.
Delegate handler for when our request to check whether we are in a party gets a response
Delegate handler for when our request to accept an invite and join a party gets a response
Delegate handler for when our request to query all party info completes
Delegate handler for when we get a response back from the backend about leaving the party specified in this task
Gets a string representation of the information we are using to join a party, or blank if none is valid. Used for debug printing
Gets a formatted string to use for errors relating to party join
Async task to join a party from join info with an invite token
